privacy.title: Privacy Policy
sections: Information we process
CodeQuest may process account details, authentication identifiers, learning progress, submitted work, preferences and platform activity needed to provide the service.
How information is used
Information is used to operate the platform, save progress, personalise learning, provide collaboration features, prevent abuse and improve reliability.
AI-assisted features
When an AI mentor endpoint is enabled, relevant prompts and limited learning context may be sent through the configured server-side AI service. Provider secrets are never stored in browser code.
Data sharing
Private learning data is not public by default. Portfolio files and evidence exports are created only at the user’s request.
Retention and deletion
Production deployments should provide reasonable export and deletion controls and configure appropriate retention rules.
Security
The platform is designed around authentication, row-level security and least-privilege access. No system can guarantee absolute security.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
sections: Use of the service
CodeQuest is provided for lawful learning, teaching and professional-development purposes.
Accounts
Users are responsible for maintaining account security and activity performed through their account.
Learning content
Educational content and credentials do not guarantee employment, external recognition or a particular outcome.
User submissions
Users remain responsible for submitted code and content and must not upload unlawful, confidential or malicious material.
Acceptable use
Users must not compromise the platform, access another user’s data or abuse execution environments.
Availability and changes
Features may evolve. Reasonable efforts should preserve progress and communicate material changes.
Limitation
The service cannot guarantee that all content, execution results or recommendations are error-free. Important decisions should be independently verified.
